LanguageData.RRS_GizmoSetThresholdDesc: Set the health percentage at which mechanoids will seek this repair station.
LanguageData.RRS_GizmoEjectOccupantDesc: Force the current mechanoid to leave the repair station.
LanguageData.RRS_LetterRepairCompleteText: {0} has been fully repaired at the robot repair station.
LanguageData.RRS_LetterNoSteelText: The robot repair station has run out of steel and cannot continue repairing {0}.
LanguageData.RRS_StatRepairSpeedDesc: How quickly this station repairs mechanoid health per day.
